sources.title: Jimmy Clitheroe film : Stars In Your Eyes (1956)
sources.description: Stars In Your Eyes (1956)  :  Nat Jackley, Pat Kirkwood, Jimmy Clitheroe British Musical Comedy.  Feature film starring Northern comedian Nat Jackley.

metadata.Plot: A group of talented young performers buy a dilapidated theatre to showcase their acts - but unscrupulous property developers plan dirty tricks to disrupt the first night's performance.
metadata.Writer: Maurice Elvey, Hubert Gregg, Francis Miller
metadata.Actors: Nat Jackley, Pat Kirkwood, Bonar Colleano
